subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy sincerity, constancy and firmness are manifest and evident unto this servant, and the confirmations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان خلوص و ثبوت و رسوخ شما در نزد این عبد واضح و مشهود و تاییدات
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
